titleStmt.title: SII 26.561: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 561. (A.R. No. 531 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: A quadrangular pillar set up in the same place.

p.hi: Poṉṉin Perumāḷ Parākrama-Pāṇḍyadēva: Ś. 1384 and year 31+9, Mithuna (Āṉi) 28, ba. 13, Friday, Mṛigaśīrsha = 1462 A.D., June 25.

summary.p: This inscription is in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It records a decision made, on the date quoted above, by the people (janam), the Veḷḷālas of the 18 nāḍus, the two Pattiri groups and the five classes of parikaras (servants). It is preceded by an account of the building of the temple of the god Viśvanātha with all its constituent shrines and enclosures at Dakshiṇa-kāśi (Teṉkāśi) by the king. It is stated that on Śaka 1368, Ṛishabha (Vaikāśi) 10, śu. 10, Friday Uttiram = 1446 A.D., May 6, he performed the karshaṇa ceremony in the place where the temple was to be built and called it Dakshiṇa-kāśi, built the temple (tiruppaḍai-vīdu) and installed therein the images of Viśvanātha and the goddess Ulagamuḻuḍaiyanāchchiyār. Shrines to Sahasraliṅga and the Saktipīṭha were built, and parivāra deities like Ṛishabhadēvar were installed; installed the image of the goddess Piḍāri named Arikēsarinaṅgai in a shrine constructed on the western 5th Street and built the shrines for Aikēsarippiḷḷaiyār, maṇḍapas for bathing and offerings and other structures. It is stated that the work on these was begun by the king in the 21+22 and year and was completed in 31+9th year, 17 years after its start, and in this divine work, not a work by human beings, all the various groups of people mentioned above were associated. It further states that to provide for the worship, offerings and services in various shrines and for the Maghā festival in the month of Māśi, villages listed below were gifted as dēvadāna. They included Teṉkāśi, Ilañji, Kuṉṟakkuḍi, Puliyūr, Pāṭṭakkuṟichchi, Vīrapāṇḍyanallūr, and Tañjāvūr, Kāḍeṟṟai, Vaḷḷaimuṭṭam, Paṉṟimuṭṭam, Taṇṇambai, and Kaṟṟuchcheṟṟai in Nallūrppaṟṟu, all these in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu, Tuvaraṅkāḍ and Iḍaittavaṇai in Kuṟumaṟai-nāḍu; and Naḍuviltalaik-kūṟṟuppaṟṟu in Māṉanilainallūr and Teṉkarai Kārikuṟichchi, and Piḷḷaiyārkuḷam in Kaṟkkudināḍu. It is also stated that the lands in various other places which had become fallow, and now reclaimed and grouped into Viśvanāthanallūr, Parākkiramapāṇḍyanallūr, and Sahavīrarāmappērēri in the Mēlppāṟṟu in Teṉṉāri-nāḍu; Kāśikkuvāyttapērēri in Kuṟuṅkāṇippāṟṟu and Kāśikkuvayttanallūr in Tamañjūrppaṟṟu in Kuṟumaṟai, Vitaraṇaviṉōdavaḷanāḍu alias Viśvanātappērēri in Irāśasiṅgappērērippaṟṟu in Āri-nāḍu; and Tuṭṭārvākaṇḍappērēri in Vīraśikāmaṇippaṟṟu in Kallaga-nāḍu. It further records some more gifts of paddy and money in this connection. All these gifts were ratified by the assembly of the various groups of people mentioned at the beginning who had agreed to continue to protect the gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍaryya metat sattam samasta
suramaulibhiḥ . śāsanam viśvanādhasya śam
bhorjjayati śāśvatam . śakābdam Āyirattu muṉ
ṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu nāliṉ meṟcellā niṉṟa
svastiśrī kojaṭilavarmmarāna tribhuvanaccakrava
ttikaḷ perumāḷ Arikesarī devar Eṉṟu tiru
nāmam Uṭaiya poṉṉiṉ perumāḷ
parākrama pāṇḍyadevar Iruntaruḷiya Iṭat
tukku yāṇṭu muppattu Oṉṟāvatiṉ Etir Oṉ
patāvatu midhuna ñāyaṟṟu Irupatteṭṭāntiya
tiyum Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum śukravāramum
peṟṟa nammuṭaiya Iruntaruḷiya Iṭattiṉ tirunāḷ
Āṉa mragaśirṣattu nāḷ Ainamum patiṉeṭṭu nāṭṭu ve
ḷḷāḻarum Iraṇṭu pattirivaḻiyum maṟṟum Añcuvakai
ppaṭṭa parikaramuṅ kūṭik kaṟpitta kāriyamāvatu Uṭaiyār
viśvanādhan Uttarakāśiyileḻuntaruḷi Irun
ta civālayam jirṇṇa mākaiyāle namakku dakṣi
ṇa kāśiyāka Ālaiyañceytu taraveṇum
Eṉṟu Eṅkaḷuṭaiya karttar perumāḷ Arikesari
devar Eṉṟu tirunāmamuṭaiya poṉṉiṉ peru
māḷ parākramapāṇḍyadevar Iruntaruḷiya Iṭa
ttiṉ Uṭaṉe supanattile tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi A
ruḷukaiyāle muṉṉāḷ śakābdam Āyirattu muṉ
ṉūṟṟu Aṟupatteṭṭiṉ mel ṛṣabhañāyaṟṟu
ppattān tiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum śukra
vāramum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ miṉamu hūttamā
ka karṣaṇaiyum ceytu dakṣiṇakāśiyākat ti
ruppaṭai vīṭum Uṇṭu Ākki Uṭaiyār
viśvanādhaṉaiyum nācciyār Ulakamuḻutu
muṭaiya nācciyāraiyum pratiṣṭhittu Iṉṉāya
ṉārkkut tirukkoyil Upānādi stūpye
n=tamākavum jharddhamaṇḍapam Iṭaināḻikai
mahāmaṇḍapam sopānam Āvaraṇa go
purādikaḷun tiruppaṇi ceytu nācciyār
Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiya nācciyārkkun ti
rukkoyilum Āvaraṇamuṅ kuṟaivaṟa tiru
ppaṇiyuñ ceytu gopuramumārambhittu
sahasraliṅgālayamum śaktipiṭhālamum
ceytu ṛṣabhadevar mutalāka Uḷḷa pari
vāranāyaṉmāraiyum pratiṣṭhattu sahasra
liṭhabhamum śaktiviṭhamum pratiṣṭhittu Arikesari
naṅkai Eṉṟu tirunāmamuṭaiya piṭāriyai
yum pratiṣṭhittu piṭāri koyilum melai Añ
cān tiruvitiyil Arikecarip piḷḷaiyār tiru
kkoyilum Āruṭṭu maṇṭapamum
veccamutu maṇṭapamum maṟṟumik
koyilkaḷiluḷḷa tiruppaṇikaḷum
mahāgopuramum Eṅkaḷ kattar Iru
ntaruḷiya Iṭam muṉṉāḷ Iraṇṭā
vatiṉ Etir Irupattiraṇṭāvatu vai
kāci mātan tuṭaṅki muppattu Oṉṟā
vatiṉ Etir Oṉpatāvatu varai patiṉe
ḻu varṣattukkuḷḷut tiruppaṇi ceytu na
ṟai veṟṟiṉa Itu māṉuṣa malladai
vikameṉṟu Ellārumaṟintu koḷḷa
ḷavum Eṅkaḷuṭaiya kattar Iruntaruḷi
ya Iṭam tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟiyaruḷa nāṅka
ḷuṅ karṣaṇai tuṭaṅki Intat tiruppa
ṇiyellāṅ kūṭacceykaiyuñ
ceytu Eṅkaḷ Iruntaruḷiya Iṭam I
ṉṉāyaṉārkkum nācciyārkkum maṟṟu
ḷḷa nāyaṉmārkkum pūjāṅkattu
kku veṇṭum Aṉaittak kotti
luḷḷāraiyuṅ kaṟpittu tiruvāpara
ṇamum parikala pariścinnamuṅ kuṭuttu
pūcaiyuṅ kuṟaivaṟa naṭatta mācimā
tattil mahattu nāḷ tirtthamāka naṭanta
potukiṟa tirunāḷu naṭatti pūjai
kku veṇṭum Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu
cāttuppaṭi kaṟpūram kuṅkumam paṇi
nir tirumālai tiripparivaṭṭam tiruvi
ḷakku Uṭpaṭṭa palavakaikkum maṟṟu
m veṇṭum nityanimittaṅkaḷuk
kum tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa teṉṉāri
nāṭṭut teṉkāciyum Ilañcikuṉṟa
kkuṭi puḷiyūr pāṭṭakkuṟicci virapā
ṇṭiya nallūr Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum nal
lūrppaṟṟil tañcāvūr kāṭeṟṟivaḷ
ḷai muṭṭam paṉṟimuṭṭam taṇṇam
pai kaṟṟucceṟṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum
kuṟumaṟai nāṭṭut tuvaraṅkāṭum Iṭai
tavaṇaiyum karkkuṭināṭṭu māṉanilai na
llūril Aka vayalil naṭuvilttalaik kū
ṟṟil viṭṭapaṟṟum Ippaṟṟil teṉkarai
kāri kuṟicci piḷḷaiyār kuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa pa
ṟṟum Āka Ippaṟṟukkaḷum viṭṭu Ivai ni
ṅkalāka Itukku muṉpu kuḷamuṅkālum
Aṇaiyum Aṉṟivaṉ kāṭāykkiṭan
ta kāṭukaḷile pala Iṭattilum Ervai
pārttu putitākak kuḷaṅkaḷum veṭṭi Ikku
ḷaṅkaḷukku Ervaiyākak kālkaḷum Aṇai
kaḷum kaṇṭu kāṭum veṭṭiya puravukaḷun ti
ruttit tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa teṉṉārinā
ṭṭu melpanṟu viśvanāta nallūr parāk
kiṟama pāṇṭiyanallūr cakavirarāmappe
reri Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum kuṟumaṟai nāṭṭuk
kuṟuṅkāṇippaṟṟil kācikku vāytta pe
reriyum tāmañcūrp paṟṟil kācikku vāy
tta nallūrum Ārināṭṭu Irāca ciṅkap pe
rerippaṟṟil vitāṇa viṉotavaḷanāṭāṉa
viśvanātap pereri Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum kalla
ka nāṭṭu viracikāmaṇippaṟṟil tuṭṭār var
kaṇṭap pereri Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum Āka Imma
riyāti Uḷḷa paṟṟukkaḷun tevatāṉamāka viṭṭu
kaṟavaik kāṇattukku Iṟaikkuṭiyāka vi
ṭṭa pacu Aimpatum pativu mutalākak kuṇ
ṇūr pākūrkku naṭuuḷḷa nāṭṭavarkaḷā
kak kūṭi mākkalamākak kārpacāṉam
payir niṉṟa nilattukkuk kaṟpittuk ku
ṭutta māttāl pātikkoṭṭai nel
lum paṭṭaikkuṭiyiṉ kaṟpitta Ā
ṇṭu Oṉṟukku per Oṉṟukkup paṇam O
ṉṟum Āyattukkup paṇam Oṉṟukkumāka kā
ṇippaṇamum koṭittoṭṭattukku
kkuḻi Oṉṟukkuppaṇam Araikkālum kaṟa
vaikkāṇattukkup pacu Oṉṟukkup paṇam
Oṉṟum Ākak kaṟpittu naṭantu potukiṟa
Itukkum Ivai niṅkalākap perumāḷ
veṉṟu mālaiyiṭṭa perumāḷ
virapāṇḍyatevar Iruntaruḷiyiṭam
tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi kaṟpittaruḷit tiruvat
tayāma pūcaiyil kūṭanaṭantu po
tukiṟa tiruppaṇyārattukku veṇṭu
m celavukkut tevatāṉamākak ka
llaka nāṭṭu viracikāmaṇippaṟṟil
Aruḷaikuḷattil viṭṭaruḷiṉa nila
m pattumāvum teṉṉārināṭṭuc
ceṅkoṭṭaiyil Irāmirap paṉe
yil tevatāṉamāka viṭṭuk kaiyā
ṇṭu potukiṟa nilam nālumāvum
Ivai niṅkalāka melviṭukiṟa paṟṟu
kkaḷukkum Iṟaikkuṭikaḷukkum I
k koyilil nampiyār mutal ve
ṭṭiyāṉ kaṭaiyāka Uḷḷa koyi
ṟ parikarttārkkum Akarattukkum
maṭapatikaḷukkum Intat tiruppaṭai
vīṭṭil maṟṟum yāvar Oruttar Iru
kkiṟa Avarkaḷukku Oru Aḻivu Aṉṉiyā
yam vārāmal Akattājjana
mum patiṉ Eṭṭu nāṭṭu veḷ
ḷāḻarum Iraṇṭu pattirivaḻiyu
maṟṟum Añcuvakaippaṭṭa pari
karamum Uḷḷa nāḷkkāttu Ira
kṣittuk koḷḷuvomākavum
Itukku Oruttar Aḻivu Annyāya
m niṉaikkiṟavarkaḷ Uṇṭākil
Itu cettum koṉṟum nilai
niṟuttik kuṭāmal Irukkiṟavar
kaḷ śivadrohamum gurudro
hamum svāmidrohamum gova
dhaiyum viśvāsapātakamum ce
ykiṟavarkaḷ Ituvārāmal Irakṣit
tu koṇṭu potuvomākavum
śubhamastu naṉṟāka §
Digital edition of SII 26.561 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
